headline: Diana Shipping Inc. Announces Results of 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: ATHENS, Greece, May 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) (the "Company"), a global shipping company specializing in the ownership and bareboat charter-in of dry bulk vessels, today announced that the Company's Annual Meeting of Shareholders (the "Meeting") was duly held on May 28, 2026, in a virtual format only via the Internet. Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. acted as inspector of the Meeting. At the Meeting, each of the following proposals, which are set forth in m
